title: México de mis recuerdos
actors: Fernando Soler, Sofía Álvarez, Joaquín Pardavé
plot: Chucho Flores, a bohemian composer writes a waltz "Carmelita" dedicated to the wife of president Diaz, after listening the waltz the president instructs to Susanito Peñafiel y Somellera seek the composer and to give him a piano as...
